reasoning: The control CM-6 (1) focuses on automated management, application, and verification of configuration settings, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through several security domains. Audit logging in Kubernetes, similar to AWS CloudTrail, ensures that changes and access to the cluster are logged and can be verified. Etcd encryption ensures that sensitive data stored in etcd is protected, akin to volume encryption in cloud environments. Admission controllers can enforce security policies automatically, ensuring that configurations adhere to security standards before being applied.
title: Configuration Settings | Automated Management, Application, and Verification
